Fix home page rendering: show single spinner until all sections load together

All home content (top artists + trending sections) now fetched via Promise.all
and gated behind a single loadingHomeContent state. Nothing renders until both
fetches complete, preventing the popcorn pop-in effect.

commit.message:
Smart elevation-based flood water on streets, dense sensor placement

- Remove ALL circle-based flood layers (no more blue radius)
- Add smart water flow simulation using IDW elevation interpolation
- Water fills lowest streets first, rises with flood severity
- Road geometry from Mapbox vector tiles for realistic "water on streets"
- Redesign seed: 20 sensors packed in one Aventura neighborhood
- Sensors placed at actual street intersections with elevation gradient
- Biscayne Corridor (low, flood-prone) → West Aventura (high, dry)
- Flood events biased toward low-elevation sensors for realism

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: auto-resolve cross-company invoice access for print/PDF export

When a user views or prints an invoice that belongs to a different
company than their active session, the backend now transparently
checks if the user has sales:read permission in that company and
serves the invoice from there. This eliminates the raw JSON error
shown in print/PDF dialogs and deep-links.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: Romanian translation audit — replace 'Gospodărie' + fix hardcoded English

- Replace 'Gospodărie' with 'Comun' (short labels) and 'Cheltuieli comune' (page title)
  More modern and natural Romanian for a budgeting app context
- Fix hardcoded English on Loans page: 'fixed' → t('loans.fixed'), '/mo' → t('recurring.perMo')
- Fix capitalization: 'Ieri' → 'ieri', 'vs Luna' → 'vs luna'
- Fix banking term: 'Maturitate' → 'Scadență' (standard Romanian)
- Fix grammar: 'din totdeauna' → 'total', 'Per membru' → 'Pe membru'
- Improve phrasing: 'Suport eu tot' → 'Plătesc eu tot'
- Add 'comun' keyword to CommandPalette search

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Dashboard overhaul + scope upload fix + shared Claim type

- Fix scope multiple:false → true (unblocks 2nd scope upload for Matt/18 Catamount)
- Fix unsafe cast in file array access with type-safe fieldMap
- Add shared Claim interface (src/types/claim.ts) used by all 3 dashboards
- User dashboard: KPI stats bar, filter tabs, file counts, win banner, financial summary
- Admin dashboard: file inventory grid in expandable rows, Files column, financial data

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Visual redesign: combat stage, world map, reward popup, and front door

Rewrite combat view with StS2-inspired stage layout (battlefield,
sprites, fanned card hand, energy orb, end turn button). Replace
full-page reward screen with centered popup overlay. Add visual
world map with act imagery and zone progression. Redesign front
door, character select, and safe zone views. Add cache-busting
to build script for Cloudflare CDN. Include act map images,
character portraits, and reference assets.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add pour back toggle to consumption entries and integrate into daily report

- New is_pour_back field on consumption entries (migration, API, form, sync)
- New consumptionCalculations.js helper (same pattern as receipt/lodgement helpers)
- Builder now uses consumption helper and produces comparison data
- Report shows consumption/pour back entries with type column
- Report shows comparison table: entry totals vs daily sales nozzle reading totals
  (mismatches highlighted in red)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Major architecture improvements: central config, public reports, auto-update triggers

- Add buildings.php as single config file (publicFolderId, privateFolderId, webAppURL)
  All PHP scripts now load from this file — only buildings.php needs editing for new buildings
- Add public-report.php for unauthenticated reports (Board of Directors); supports nav=0
  to suppress back bar when embedded as iframe
- Add auto-update triggers to building-script.gs (onEditHandler + runScheduledUpdate)
  with 30-second debounce; updates all 4 list tabs within ~1 minute of any edit
- Fix get-doc-byname iframe spinner: start display:none, reveal on onload
- Update footer-for-sites.js: add public-report iframe handler, openPublicReport(),
  openAdmin(), spinner fix for doc iframes
- Update README and sheets/README with full setup instructions, correct footer script,
  and trigger installation steps

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add road-following flood visualization for realistic water-on-streets effect

Replace faint circle-based flood zones with a dual-layer approach:
- Queries Mapbox vector tile road data near flood sensors
- Renders road segments as blue water with glow and bright center
- Updates dynamically on zoom/pan via moveend and sourcedata events
- Boosts circle layer opacity for better area glow visibility
- Applied to both Overview (DeviceMap) and Analytics (AnalyticsMap)

commit.message:
Prefer shortest word when expanding partial selections

When a partial selection like "echt" appears inside multiple words
(e.g. "hechtingsbevorderaars" and "hechting"), the expander now
prefers the shortest enclosing word. Previously it always picked
the first occurrence (IndexOf), which was often the longer compound.

commit.message:
Initial commit — Managing Health POC

Full-stack health lifestyle web app for Jersey (Channel Islands).

Stack: Next.js 14 App Router, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, Prisma, iron-session, Tailwind CSS, Docker Compose.

Features:
- Patient and admin roles with parish-based localisation
- Activities with recurring series (daily/weekly/bi-weekly/monthly)
- Recipes with AI-powered nutrition extraction (Claude Haiku)
- AI Buddy chat companion with safety classifier, condition-aware lifestyle support, and programme context (activities + recipes injected per message)
- Admin oversight for flagged Buddy conversations
- Patient homepage with attending events + 10-day activity window

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: JerseyHealth
repository.description: Managing Health POC — Jersey lifestyle health app with activities, recipes, and AI Buddy

commit.message:
Fix: Sync all 70 sheets every 6 hours

- Increase BATCH_SIZE from 2→10 to process all sheets concurrently within 45s cron timeout
- Update cron schedule from daily (0 0 * * *) to every 6 hours (0 */6 * * *)
- 70 sheets now complete in ~21s vs ~105s previously (well within timeout)

Fix term selection expansion, auto-refresh on editor changes, add F5 refresh

SelectionExpander now scans all occurrences and prefers word-boundary
matches, preventing "hechting" from expanding to "hechtingsbevorderaars"
when the standalone word exists in the same segment.

TermbaseEditorDialog now notifies the in-memory term index on all
delete, edit, add, bulk-NT, and merge operations so TermLens refreshes
automatically without needing to navigate away and back.

New F5 shortcut force-reloads all termbases from disk as a manual
fallback.

Fix OV/SH: fall back to last entry when no COB entry exists

last entry's tank readings when no COB entry exists for a date.

homepage section. Changed to /# prefix to always route correctly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Secure API, ration credits, merge elevation into analytics

Security:
- Require Supabase auth (Bearer token) for AI analysis endpoint
- Remove debug endpoint that could INSERT into production DB
- Block force refresh if analysis is <7 days old (429)
- Error messages display with red styling instead of green

API credit rationing:
- Extend analysis cache from 7 to 14 days
- Use Haiku for neighborhood-specific analysis (vs Sonnet for full)
- Reduce max_tokens from 4000 to 2048/1500
- Reduce recommendations per run from 6-8 to 4-6
- Limit rainfall data pairs sent to AI

Page integration:
- Remove Elevation from sidebar (5 nav items instead of 6)
- Add city-wide elevation & road dip overview to Analytics landing
- Analytics description updated to reflect elevation insights

commit.message:
Fix tank stock: use close-of-business entry instead of chaining

Tank closing stock is an absolute reading, not a cumulative counter.
The report now finds the COB entry for each date and reads its
tankReadings directly, instead of chaining through all entries
(which broke when duplicate entries existed for the same date).

docs: restructure Setting Ollama guide — install Ollama before Quack config

The guide now follows the correct flow: install Ollama via terminal first,
then configure in Quack GUI. Previously the GUI section came first without
mentioning the Ollama prerequisite.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Client-side ZIP extraction + duplicate upload handling

- Add JSZip dependency for client-side ZIP extraction before upload
- Extract photos from ZIPs in new-claim and claim detail upload flows
- Filter out macOS metadata (__MACOSX), thumbnails (<10KB), non-image files
- Add file size warning in FileUploadZone for files >45MB
- Handle "already exists" errors gracefully (treat as success)
- Enable upsert on signed upload URLs to prevent duplicate errors
- Set bucket file_size_limit to 50MB (individual photos are 2-10MB)

Fixes: 13 Chrisfield Ave upload failure (100MB+ church photo ZIP)
Fixes: 18 Catamount Dr duplicate upload error

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix kills HUD: detect current player by kill increase instead of guessing first name

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Reduce per-tick allocations in world step loop

Reuse four scratch buffers (order, cached_pred, alive, computed) across
ticks instead of allocating new Vecs each step. Eliminates ~4.6 GB of
allocations per generation on default config.

Change scored representation in evolution from Vec<(Agent, f32)> to
Vec<(usize, f32)>, removing 384 agent clones per generation.

Deduplicate action argmax: compute once in step(), pass to apply_outputs().

commit.message:
Include user profile in token estimates for prompt variants

Resolves {user_profile} into each prompt variant before estimating tokens,
so the cost estimate reflects the actual prompt size sent to the LLM.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Switch daemon logging from stdout to native bitmonero.log files

Monerod now writes its native log file (bitmonero.log) to its data
directory instead of piping file-format logs to stdout via
--log-file=/dev/stdout. This provides richer log output (thread IDs,
categories, source locations) with a single write path.

- Remove log-file: /dev/stdout from all configs and prompts
- Add max-log-file-size: 0 to disable monerod log rotation
- Revert tee process substitution in user_agents.rs (plain exec)
- Update log_parser.rs to find bitmonero.log, fall back to bash.*.stdout
- Add --log-dir flag to tx_analyzer for flexible log discovery
- Update all Python analysis scripts to search /tmp/monero-*/bitmonero.log
  with fallback to legacy shadow.data/hosts/*/bash.*.stdout
- Update check_sim.sh to read daemon logs from bitmonero.log
- Archive daemon_logs/ in run_sim.sh (already added)
- Update docs and CLAUDE.md with new log paths

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Add structured logging and traceback capture for all 500 errors

Previously, caught exceptions were re-raised as HTTP 500 without logging,
making production debugging impossible. Now all error paths log full
tracebacks via logger.exception(), and a global exception handler catches
anything that slips through.

commit.message:
refactor!: rename claim-type selectors from coder/code-reviewer to doer/reviewer

The ReleaseClaim `role` parameter values "coder" and "code-reviewer" were
confusing because they looked like agent role names but were actually
claim-type selectors (which claim slot to release). A code-planner had to
pass "coder" to release its claim, which was misleading.

Renamed to "doer", "reviewer", "both" across CLI, MCP, and ops layers.
Added ClaimDoer/ClaimReviewer/ClaimBoth constants to the roles package as
single source of truth.

BREAKING CHANGE: the `--role` flag on `liza release-claim` and the `role`
parameter on `liza_release_claim` MCP tool now accept "doer"/"reviewer"
instead of "coder"/"code-reviewer". The default changed from
"code-reviewer" to "reviewer".

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- Flip rg sandbox test to fail-on-bug instead of assert-broken-behavior
- Add Default impl for SessionState, simplify sandbox_env()
- Update docs: WINDOWS_SANDBOX.md documents AppContainer child process bug,
  DESIGN.md and STATUS.md reflect current state

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Shift+Enter with WH_GETMESSAGE hook, normalize pasted newlines

Trados Studio's IMessageFilter runs before ours (FIFO order), consuming
Enter/Shift+Enter before our filter ever sees them. The WH_GETMESSAGE
thread-local hook fires inside GetMessage — before the IMessageFilter
chain starts — letting us replace WM_KEYDOWN with WM_NULL so Trados
never sees the Enter key.

Also normalizes pasted text from Trados: Shift+Enter in Trados creates
bare \n line endings, but the Windows EDIT control only displays \r\n.
WndProc override for WM_PASTE converts \n → \r\n.

Also renamed "Assistant Help" to "Supervertaler Assistant Help".

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: comprehensive mobile UI overhaul — no more overflow/overlap

Dashboard:
- Stat cards: changed from horizontal scroll to 3-col grid that fits
- Reduced StatCard font/padding for mobile (14px value, 9px label, p-2)
- Header: smaller title (text-lg), hide subtitle on mobile, compact icons
- Hide "Personalizează statisticile" text on mobile (icon only)
- In My Pocket: responsive text size, flex-wrap for comparison stats

Reports:
- Stat cards: smaller font/padding on mobile (text-sm, p-2.5)
- Tabs: scrollable with whitespace-nowrap
- Pie chart: percentage-only labels (no overlapping names), smaller radius
- Category legend: truncate names, responsive font size
- Date inputs: flex-wrap for mobile

Loans:
- Limit amount width to max-w-[45%] so loan name gets more space
- Smaller amount font on mobile (text-sm vs text-lg)

TransactionRow:
- Remove JS truncate(28) — let CSS truncate handle it naturally
- Smaller icon (36px vs 40px), tighter gaps, compact action buttons
- Flex-wrap on metadata line for long category/tag combos

StatCard (shared component):
- Value: text-[14px] on mobile with truncate for overflow safety
- Label: text-[9px] on mobile with leading-tight
- Icon: 20px on mobile, reduced padding/margins throughout

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
